title: Test Implement External Guardrail Templates And Prompt Loading

handoff_summary.completed: Updated [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py) to cover `load_guardrail_template(...)` across all built-in agent types and to assert every built-in worker prompt references its resolved template path. Ran `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest tests.test_orchestrator -v`; all 25 tests passed.
handoff_summary.remaining: No additional test changes are required for the B0003 prompt-loading slice. A separate tooling follow-up may be useful to make the default test invocation consistently import the active worktree sources without needing `PYTHONPATH=src`.
handoff_summary.risks: The local environment resolves `codex_orchestrator` from an editable install outside this worktree unless `PYTHONPATH=src` is set, so unqualified test runs can validate the wrong source tree.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed with downstream review or merge validation using the worktree-local import path (`PYTHONPATH=src`) for Python test commands.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Low. I only changed [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py), but that file is shared with the implementation bead's scope and should be coordinated before further edits.
